hero.name: MARTIN FAREL
hero.role2: Fullstack Developer and AI Implementation Specialist

about.label: 01 — About Me
about.title: Who am I
about.p1: I'm an entrepreneur, UI/UX Designer and Fullstack Developer focused on building interfaces that blend solid logic with intentional design.
about.p2: I specialize in end-to-end digital products — from research and wireframes to production deployment. I work with Svelte, React, Angular, Flutter, Kotlin and Dart as needed, NestJS/Node.js for backend, PostgreSQL for databases, and deploy on Heroku, Vercel and Firebase. For design I use Figma, Illustrator and After Effects.
about.p3: I believe the best software is invisible: it works so well the user never notices it.

react.name: React / Next.js
react.desc: Fast and accessible interfaces focused on performance.

svelte.name: Svelte
svelte.desc: Reactive web development with excellent performance.

flutter.name: Flutter
flutter.desc: Cross-platform apps for iOS and Android.

process.name: AI in Process
process.desc: Using AI as assistant to accelerate development and code review.

product.name: AI in Product
product.desc: Integrate AI models: NLP, chatbots and recommendations.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Analytics
dashboard.desc: Real-time data visualization platform for business metrics. Integration with multiple sources, interactive charts and report exports.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.desc: Complete online store with cart, payments, admin panel and inventory system. Responsive design focused on conversion and mobile UX.

design.title: Design System Library
design.desc: Design system with over 60 documented components, design tokens, usage guidelines and integrated Storybook.

openpass.desc: Developed and implemented improvements across the company's platform vertical. Proposed clean solutions and scaled AI-driven processes, including automated documentation MCP with n8n, code review agents, and AI-based products.

growth.role: Lead Fullstack Developer and AI Implementation Specialist
growth.desc: Direct collaboration with CEO and product team to prototype, design and deliver UI/UX experiences through a lean design process: research, design, testing, iteration and development.

fichap.desc: Led UI prototyping using the company's design system. Collaborated with product and development teams on core projects to improve product interfaces and experiences.

catek.desc: Mobile UI and web application design for Catek's R&D department and key clients.

freelance.desc: Graphic and web design for local businesses.
